title: Remote Work and Productivity
content: Remote work can improve productivity when teams have strong communication practices, clear goals, and reliable tools.

title: Hybrid Work Flexibility
content: Hybrid work gives employees flexibility while preserving some in-person collaboration and team connection.

title: Remote Work Risks
content: Common risks of remote work include employee isolation, security concerns, and coordination overhead.

title: Team Communication
content: Distributed teams need intentional communication habits, documentation, and regular check-ins to stay aligned.
